goal.value: Refactor crates/data to use a unified OxDataError and implement expanded specifications for ox_transaction, ox_introspection, and ox_data_broker.

progress.value:

- [x] Analyzed crates/data/ox_data_object structure

- [ ] Update crates/data/ox_data_object/src/lib.rs to export OxDataError
- [ ] Refactor other crates in crates/data to use the new OxDataError location
